evidence_spans.span:
Euler's Method approximates its solution by repeatedly applying

\[
y_{n+1}=y_n+h f(t_n,y_n).
\]

The Forward Euler Method advances an approximate solution using the current slope. Its update is

\[
y_{n+1}=y_n+h f(t_n,y_n).
\]

rationale: Both mentions refer to the same numerical method for solving ODEs, as evidenced by the identical update formula y_{n+1}=y_n+h f(t_n,y_n) and the same conceptual description of approximating the solution using the current slope.
